Commercial Account Executive (French-speaking)
source_jobs.description: <h4><strong>About the Team</strong></h4><p>The Commercial Sales Account Executive is pivotal to Miro’s go-to-market strategy in countries, focusing on landing new logos and driving growth by expanding our existing customers. You will join a dynamic, high-performing group that thrives on innovation and collaboration while championing Miro’s mission to empower teams to create the next big thing. Our team balances ambitious goals with a supportive and fun culture, where success is celebrated and personal growth is encouraged. As a French based in Amsterdam, you will be supported in our HQ in Amsterdam acting as a hub for ressources while your customers will be in France.</p><h4><strong>About the Role</strong></h4><div class="sc-kWREmZ gtHHTF"><div class="sc-fxtexz gAAGsB">As a Commercial Account Executive, you will play a critical role in expanding Miro’s footprint by landing net new customers and driving expansion within the 500-3,000 employee segment. This role is designed for sales professionals who excel in a fast-paced, high-volume sales environment and have a passion for helping dynamic companies unlock their potential with Miro. You will be responsible for managing the full sales cycle and take ownership of developing and advancing your pipeline.</div></div><h4><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h4><ul><li>Prospect and Engage: Leverage outbound strategies and our high performing sales tool to identify and connect with high-potential prospects in your territory.</li><li>Pipeline Management: Build and maintain a high-volume pipeline of opportunities, ensuring consistent deal flow and efficient sales cycles.</li><li>Value Selling: Understand customer needs and challenges, demonstrating how Miro’s platform addresses their specific use cases and delivers measurable business value.</li><li>Customer Relationships: Develop trust and credibility with key stakeholders, including senior decision-makers, within prospective organizations.</li><li>Sales Excellence: Drive deals to close efficiently by managing high-velocity sales cycles while maintaining exceptional attention to detail and customer engagement.</li><li>Collaboration: Work closely with Marketing, Customer success, and Sales Engineering to ensure alignment and optimize customer expansion efforts. Work with your extended sales team in France to create sustainable business in France.</li><li>Market Intelligence: Stay informed about industry trends, competitive offerings, and advancements in SaaS to position Miro as the solution of choice.</li></ul><h4><strong>What you’ll need</strong></h4><ul><li>2+ years in a SaaS or technology sales environment, with experience in a full-cycle closing role</li><li>Strong prospecting abilities, effective communication skills and proficiency in value-based selling techniques</li><li>Familiarity with advanced sales tools like Salesforce, Outreach, Gong and Slack</li><li>A results-driven, entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast-moving environment</li><li>Experience managing shorter sales cycles and high transaction volumes, with the ability to balance multiple priorities</li><li>Always eager to learn and grow your technical and business skills</li><li>A team player who enjoys working cross-functionally to drive success</li><li>Fluency in French and in English</li></ul><h4><strong>What's in it for you</strong></h4><p>We want you to feel supported, connected, and ready to grow. Our global benefits package generally includes equity, a wellbeing benefit, a WFH equipment allowance, and an annual Learning &amp; Development stipend. Join

Senior Threat Detection Engineer - Intelligence
source_jobs.description: <p>We’re looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Senior Threat Detection &amp; Intelligence Engineer</strong> to help us understand how adversaries operate, detect meaningful threats early, and lead investigations when it matters most. This role sits at the intersection of threat intelligence, detection engineering, and incident investigation with an engineering-first mindset.</p><p>If you enjoy turning messy signals into clear attacker narratives, this role is for you.</p><h2>About the Team</h2><p>The Cloud Security &amp; Detection &amp; Response (CSDR) team protects Miro by staying ahead of credible threats. We focus on:</p><ul><li><p>Translating external threat intelligence into actionable detections</p></li><li><p>Building custom, high-fidelity detections for cloud and SaaS environments</p></li><li><p>Leading complex investigations and incident response</p></li><li><p>Partnering with engineering to drive security by design</p></li></ul><p>We care about context, signal quality, and attacker intent not alert volume.</p><h2>What You’ll Do</h2><ul><li><p>Track emerging threats, attacker techniques, and campaigns relevant to cloud and SaaS</p></li><li><p>Turn threat intelligence into practical detection strategies and attack hypotheses</p></li><li><p>Design and maintain context-aware detections across cloud, identity, and application layers</p></li><li><p>Lead deep investigations, from first signal to root cause and remediation</p></li><li><p>Act as a technical lead during security incidents, guiding response and decision-making</p></li><li><p>Analyze detection and investigation trends to improve preventative controls</p></li><li><p>Partner with engineering teams to raise security maturity across the organization</p></li></ul><h2>Who This Role Is For</h2><p>This role is a great fit if you:</p><ul><li><p>Think in<strong> </strong>attacker TTPs, not just alerts or dashboards</p></li><li><p>Enjoy investigating ambiguous signals and turning them into clear conclusions</p></li><li><p>Have experience in threat intelligence, threat hunting, or security investigations</p></li><li><p>Care about why something is happening, not just what fired</p></li><li><p>Want to build detection programs that evolve with the threat landscape</p></li><li><p>Are comfortable explaining technical risk in business terms</p></li></ul><p>This role is not a fit if you’re mainly focused on compliance, policy writing, or managing vendors.</p><h2>What We’re Looking For</h2><ul><li><p><strong>5–7 years in security</strong>, with <strong>2+ years in threat detection, threat intelligence, or investigations</strong></p></li><li><p>Experience in cloud-native SaaS environments (AWS strongly preferred)</p></li><li><p>Strong investigation skills and ability to analyze attacker behavior</p></li><li><p>Experience using threat intelligence to inform detection and response</p></li><li><p>Proficiency in Python and comfort automating security workflows</p></li><li><p>Experience querying large datasets (SQL or similar)</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with cloud security telemetry, logging, and detection platforms</p></li><li><p>Solid understanding of incident response and digital forensics</p&g

source_jobs.description: <h4><strong>About the Team</strong></h4><p>The Professional Services organization at Miro is focused on ensuring our Enterprise customers achieve exceptional outcomes through the Innovation Workspace. Our team of strategic advisors, onboarding experts, and technical account managers work side-by-side with customers to transform how they collaborate, build, and innovate—powered by agentic AI and Miro’s world-class platform.</p><h4><strong>About the Role</strong></h4><div>We are seeking a&nbsp;<strong>Technical Account Manager (TAM)</strong>&nbsp;to partner with Enterprise customers and help them maximize the business value of their investment in Miro. As a TAM, you will act as a&nbsp;<strong>fractional strategic advisor</strong>—guiding customers through workflow optimization, driving AI-powered adoption, and embedding Miro into their innovation operating models to secure long-term value and partnership.</div><div><br>TAMs are key players in evolving how the world’s most innovative companies Discover, Define, and Deliver new products and services. Operating with a high degree of autonomy, you will combine product knowledge, strategic insight, technical fluency, and change management expertise to drive measurable outcomes for your customers.&nbsp;</div><h4><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h4><ul><li><strong>Workflow Optimization<br></strong><ul><li>Guide customers in designing and evolving workflows across the Discover–Define–Deliver innovation lifecycle</li><li>Recommend integration strategies and automation opportunities that drive alignment, speed, and business value</li><li>Provide guidance on embedding Miro into the customer’s existing systems and ways of working</li></ul></li><li><strong>Proactive Optimization</strong><strong><br></strong><ul><li>Monitor platform health, engagement, usage patterns, and feature adoption</li><li>Deliver proactive, insight-driven recommendations to deepen adoption of Miro’s core and emerging AI capabilities</li></ul></li><li><strong>Change Management &amp; Scaling</strong><strong><br></strong><ul><li>Equip internal champions with strategies to scale adoption across departments, regions, and teams</li><li>Support customer Centers of Excellence (CoEs) with guidance on best practices, governance, and deployment at scale</li><li>Navigate organizational change to help Miro become a strategic pillar in innovation initiatives</li></ul></li><li><strong>Strategic Alignment &amp; Continuous Improvement</strong><ul><li>Collaborate with Customer Success Managers to co-facilitate impactful Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs), showcasing progress against business goals and demonstrating tangible ROI</li><li>You will provide robust adoption reporting and business outcome analytics, influencing customer strategy and reinforcing the value that underpins renewals and growth opportunities</li></ul></li></ul><h4><strong>What you’ll need</strong></h4><ul><li>5+ years in <strong>consulting</strong>,&nbsp;<strong>technical account management</strong>,&nbsp;<strong>customer success</strong>, or similar roles in&nbsp;<strong>enterprise SaaS</strong></li><li>Strong technical fluency: familiarity with&nbsp;<strong>APIs</strong>,&nbsp;<strong>integrations</strong>, and enterprise IT ecosystems</li><li>Proven ability to lead&nbsp;<strong>workflow optimization</strong>,&nbsp;<stron
